understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate a grid world and complete all levels by activating goal cells. To activate a goal, my carried piece's shape, color, and rotation had to match the goal's requirements. Stepping on the activated goal completed it, and completing all goals advanced the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move depletes stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina. Losing all lives results in game over. Modifier tiles change my piece's attributes: shape changers cycle shape, color changers cycle color, and rotation changers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Walls block movement, and blocked directions must be avoided. Goals activate only when all three attributes match, and stepping on the activated goal completes it.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate a grid world and complete all levels by activating goal cells. To activate a goal, my carried piece's shape, color, and rotation had to match the goal's requirements. Stepping on the activated goal completed it, and completing all goals advanced the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move depletes stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina. Losing all lives results in game over. Modifier tiles change my piece's attributes: shape changers cycle shape, color changers cycle color, and rotation changers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Walls block movement, and blocked directions must be avoided. Goals activate only when all three attributes match, and stepping on the activated goal completes it.
